name: Reaper

extraction.notes: First line of whatsnew.txt, e.g. 'v7.74 - June 17 2025'. Regex captures version number after optional 'v'.

release_date.notes: First line format: 'vX.XX - Month DD YYYY'.

notes: Plaintext whatsnew.txt for both version and changelog. Version parsed from first line. Universal build (macOS 10.15+). Also available via Homebrew cask. No Sparkle, no REST API. Legacy _x86_64.dmg also available.
